feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error in creating BP Customer via API
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are trying to create a new customer throught API:

PATCH https://xx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Customer(Customer='CC0010') 

We have already created the BP general's data (Business Partner(Gen.) 000000) with the API:

POST https://xxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner 

but we get the following error:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
    <code>/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/020</code>
    <message xml:lang="en">Resource not found for segment 'A_CustomerType'</message>
    <innererror>
        <application>
            <component_id>LO-MD-BP</component_id>
            <service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
            <service_id>API_BUSINESS_PARTNER</service_id>
            <service_version>0001</service_version>
        </application>
        <transactionid>63B568C79CA901E0E0065D41A20679BB</transactionid>
        <timestamp>20240220092427.0382470</timestamp>
        <Error_Resolution>
            <SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
            <SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
        </Error_Resolution>
        <longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_CustomerType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
        <errordetails>
            <errordetail>
                <ContentID/>
                <code>/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION</code>
                <message>Resource not found for segment 'A_CustomerType'</message>
                <longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_CustomerType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
                <propertyref/>
                <severity>error</severity>
                <target/>
                <transition>false</transition>
            </errordetail>
        </errordetails>
    </innererror>
</error>

Could you kindly tell me how to solve the problem?

Is there a log on S4 Public where I can go to see these errors?

thanks in advance

Giuseppe

entry.title: MRP Planned order generation for materials procured externally (Procurement type X)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are in the process of migrating from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Publid Edition.

Our customer in SAP R/3 manages his MRP by generating planned orders for externally procured materials.

As the note 2490226 says, this is no longer possible in SAP S/4HANA and MRP Live.

However, we are considering, for these externally procured type materials to indicate the Procurement Type "X - Both Procurement Types".
With this option enabled, we can generate planned orders via MRP and subsequently convert these planned orders to purchase requisitions.

This scenario has been tested and works correctly.

Based on this information, we are concern that SAP in the medium/long term will remove this functionality and we will have to re-engineer MRP processes.
Therefore, is the scenario that we have proposed a good practice contemplated by SAP or should we propose the scenario with a Procurement Type "F - External Procurement" and generate purchase requisitions through the MRP?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: GRDC-Create forms for multiple consolidation units
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,Calling for GRDC Experts.
I know that within the Application Manage Packages for the GRDC Forms we have the filter Consolidation Unit where we can input several Consolidation Unit.
Having several Conso Unit in my package will generate several line in my application Enter Package Data and thus this will imply for every Period + Conso Unit I have 1 line of forms that I can enter data forMy question is the following:
Is there a way to include several Consolidation Units within 1 form in GRDC ?

Thank you

entry.title: How to Download XML Data File of Goods Receipt in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

How can i download XML Data file for  Goods Receipt Form - Purchase Order in SAP S/4 Public Cloud?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Download XML Data File for Inspection Report in S/4 Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

How can I XML Data File for QM_INSPECTION_REPORT_FORM_E, I tried with Manage Inspection lot but i was unable to get the XML file?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: change log in Manage Purchase Contracts
entry.content:
Hello,

Using app "Manage Purchase Contracts", how to view the change log for header and items.

Best Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Automatic Create PO From Goods Receipt
entry.content: Can we create automatic PO when create goods receipt in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: Adding custom dropdown fields to Standard FIORI "Manage Customer Master Data" Application
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add custom drop-down fields in Standard FIORI Application "Manage Customer Master Data".

Please provide some guidance on how to achieve this.

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: How to run MR22(Debit/Credit Material) Mass upload in S/4 HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello seniors!

 

Material valuation app of S/4 HANA CLOUD Pubilc edition. I understand the Excel bulk change function, which is the same function as MR21 (Change Inventory Price) in the Private Edition.

However, I did not find the Debit/Credit Material Excel bulk change function, which is the same function as MR22 in the Private Edition.

Can you tell me how to run MR22 Debit/Credit Material in Excel mass change in the Manage Valuation App?

Thanks in advance
huny

entry.title: Available Options for having Custom Description in Invoice Items for Customer Projects.
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts,

We have a business requirement, where the business is looking to have a custom text in the Invoice output at the Item Description. We are searching out all available options for this requirement.

1)Is there any SAP standard option which allows us to change the Item description in the Invoice output ?

2) If we take a Custom field approach to create CDS views for BADI, we are stuck in identifying the linkage between Customer Project product in Billing tab and the Billing Document. 

Please, let us know your expert opinions on this topic ?

Thanks,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Trigger logic in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM BAdI
entry.content:
I would like to create auto increase number custom field in Manage Purchase Order app.

My current development steps are as following

1. I added a custom field to Purchase Order item screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI.

The problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Manage Purchase Order screen without saving or with saving. 

And, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Purchase Order screen just for looking information.

So, I would like to ask that

 in Manage Purchase Order app, is there any BAdI that will be trigger only when Save button is clicked (like Before Save event) and also custom field can be used ?

(Or)

 Is there any condition that can be added in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI to trigger only when Save button is clicked?

entry.title: Assign tax indicators to tax condition types in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello! Can anyone tell me in sap s4hana public cloud where can I assign the material/customer tax indicators to a custom tax condition type? I can't find this configuration point in CBC...

In SAP S4 we used OVK3 OVK4, but here I can't find it...

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Mass change for MR22 (Material debit/credit)
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are going to design a development program to do mass MR22. We want to find any CDS which involves MR22 entries or any BAPI for MR22. 

Could you please tell me how to figure it out

Thank you

entry.title: Achieving Real-Time S/4HANA Cloud Data Replication in SAP Datasphere Without DP Agent
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm looking for a solution to archieve real-time data replication from S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Datasphere without using an on-premise Data Provisioning Agent. Without a DP agent, currently it seems we're limited to Data Flows and Replication Flows, which don't support real-time replication or remote table access for views. Is this right?

Has anyone managed to bypass the need for a DP Agent to enable real-time replication and remote table functionality? I've checked the roadmap but found no hints for this functionality (https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=2023Q1-2025Q1&PRODUCT=73555000100800002141#Q1%202024). 

Best regards
Tim

entry.title: Invalid number of local collections. Open an incident while creating custom business object
entry.content:
Hi all,

I faced an error when tried to create a custom business object in S/4 HANA cloud. Before this error, I was getting error Items of type XXX must not be edited in this tenant which get resolved by the notes: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3248190

What step did I missed out to activate to allow me to create custom business object?

Thanks. 

Regards,

Ben

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Monitor Email Transmission but not reach to gmail
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 

I have configured the sender and receiver in "Manage your solution".

The PO approval email generated in "Monitor Email Transmission" app and showing status as sent but with status code 718.

The email not reach to recipient mailbox. Do you have any idea what to check for this?

Appreciate for your help.

Thanks & Regards

Monddes

entry.title: Valuated stock in transit in Advanced Intercompany Sales
entry.content: We activated Advanced Intercompany Sales Scope item and we need the system to not use the Valuated stock in transit steps as the goods are directly issued to the customer from the delivering company so there is no need to move the goods from delivering plant to transit plant and from transit plant to selling company plant then issue to the customer, so please advice how we can modify the cycle to directly issue the goods from the delivering plant to the end customer.

entry.title: Manage Email Template Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can some one please support on topic of Email Template in Public Cloud on how the configuration are done for the objects.

Thanks

entry.title: Duplicate EDI - Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

is there a possibility to activate the "Duplicate" Button for EDI Outputs?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Estorno Brazil - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,


how can we handle the Estorno (engl. Chargeback process) for NF-e in Brazil?

This is a legal required process in Brazil (Invoice reversal: when and how to do it? (nfe.io)).

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika
